retry_reason: As a put/free operation, retrying would cause a double-free and use-after-free; failure is impossible and retry is meaningless.
contract_summary: This is an RCU callback that releases all key references held by an afs_permits structure and frees the structure itself. It is invoked after an RCU grace period to safely discard the permits object. After this function executes, the permits object is invalid and must not be accessed. It is a pure put-wrapper: it decrements the refcount on each key and deallocates memory. There is no return value and no error path.

judge.reason: The function's sole purpose is to release references on all keys via key_put and then free the permits container; it is a pure put/free wrapper with no other business logic.
